transcript.text:
[In a quiet forrest...]
[Where is Tzuyang headed...?]
[Who is this?]
[Who can this be...?]
-Hello -Hello
[This is...]
[Actor & Powder Chef] [Lee Jang Woo]
[Powder prince from February]
[He's back with an upgrade]
-I can make kimchi in 30 seconds -30 seconds?
[There hasn't been anything like this]
[Shook-shook scallion kimchi]
[With thin-sliced pork belly]
[Let's see the result of the upgrade]
Hello everyone
I came to a forrest to meet with a famous chef

I've been walking for a while now The view is nice
Ta-da
I picked up some acorns too
He said he will make something great for me
I'm wondering what kind of food he prepared
It's my 2nd time meeting him
He made some excellent dishes last time
So I'm very excited Let's go
I should be almost here
Is it here?
[A mysterious man...]
Oh, hello!
Hello
It's been a while
-How've you been? -I've been good
How come you look skinnier and skinnier every time?

It's our 2nd time meeting
Well, both times then
-You look like you lost weight too -I do?
I'm around the same
You look like a wild leopard
It's a concept of a YouTuber I like
I dress like this when I go camping
[No he does not]
I'm here because you said you would cook something delicious for me
Yes, that's exactly right
-You can look forward to it -I had a great meal last time
And did you or did you not contact me again for my powder?
-I did -Yeah, I was surprised that you really wanted my powder
I used it yesterday for my meal too
I used it for my noodles I only have a little bit left
Purchase more when you're out

You make good money
Come this way
Scallion kimchi
I will show you the endgame of kimchi KBBQ
So are we eating pork belly?
Always pork belly for camping
[Happy]
Cook some kimchi
I had your scallion kimchi last time Is it the same thing?
It's upgraded
It tastes ever better?
It was really good already
This becomes sugar when it's cooked
-Have you seen anything like this before? -They look strange, what is this?
This is Maehwa Premium Pork Belly
Rolled up, frozen, and packaged

And the skin needs to be on pork belly I don't understand why people don't eat it with the skin
That chewy consistency is everything
So I made a special request to my friend that works at the butcher shop
And I made him shave the pig's hair all day
[Yes, just like this]
You can slap me if you find hair in here
Just slap me across right away
I will do my best
There should be at least 1
No way
This looks really unique
I'll go ahead and grill the meat
It's layered just like this
-And take the paper out -That's really convenient
This is my favorite sound
I listen to this before I go to sleep Sizzling meat sound

It's raining
[Must fill up the grill]
They're thinly sliced pork belly
Looks great
Cooking scallion kimchi would be perfect
It's a must
This is going to be delicious
There's a skill to this
That's right I've been a mukbang YouTuber for 4 years now
Big superior
-This is the best -Yes, love it
Fried rice is going to be so good
-You know what's up -I know some
I don't eat as much as you, but I do eat a lot
But I gain weight
Why can't I have superpowers like you?

But you are good-looking
Let's sit down
I think we need to take out the kimchi now
This is amazing
Eating this with kimchi would be great
It's my first time grilling scallion kimchi like this
1 piece on top
Roll it up like this
I wish we had 1 other person to roll everything
Amazing?
I made this combo specifically for camping because so many people were wondering why it wasn't out yet
-It's really sweet -It's good, right?
It's juicy
-It tastes even better now -It's because...
We put Korean pear in here and they were extra delicious this year
-Am I the only one eating? -May I join?

This combo is Michelin-worthy
No, but it's really like this
A very fresh chili paste pork belly
I love how you can enjoy both original and with kimchi
The scallions are so sweet and tasty
No need for extra sauce like ssamjang and sesame oil
Just scallions
This body is good too
I like that more
Let's give this a try
I never tell people that I'm a good actor
But that's your main job
I'm an actor but I don't say I'm a good actor
But when it comes to kimchi I'm phenomenal
I can't really stick to 1 type of kimchi
I like switching them up

But this scallion kimchi is right for me
This is all you need to make fried rice
I'm not good at eating vegetables
For people like us, it's not that we can't We just don't eat them
We will eat them if they're good
Can I try this uncooked?
I'll try it fresh
This is good too!
I like how it gets sweeter the more you cook it
It's perfect for pork belly
Pork belly makes meat juice Scallions make...
Scallion juice
-You're smart -I wasn't sure
Scallion juice is the best
[This is masterpiece]
[You're doing well]

This comes off well because it melts fast
This looks like flowers
No pig hair yet, right?
There's 1 bad thing about this
You're supposed to get sick of the same taste But it's not like that for this
So you can get fat
Everything balances out each other
Yes, I feel like I can keep eating
But kimchi is not easy to make
People think kimchi is hard to make
-There's a way to make kimchi in 30 seconds -30 seconds?
That's impossible
You can slap me if it goes over 30 seconds
[Let's see]
Perfect for thin pork belly slices
It took lots of experiences to find this combination

I have friends all over the world
And they were going nuts over this kimchi
We need to make Korean food global with your help
Pork belly is really popular now
And if you cook kimchi with that...
And also a shot of soju
That will wash your palate
I watch your videos often How about an English comment for your audience?
That was great
There's more food
I'll go ahead and bring it while you work on this
[Another grill]
[Stacks on stacks]
[Plating the scallion kimchi as well]
This one's cooked well
I've been eating 2 at a time Let's try just 1

This has the skin on it
The ratio is perfect
Yum
It's as nutty as sesame oil
The grease is tasty I love the smell
The sweetness does not taste artificial
So it's easy to eat
I've tried all kinds of dips with my KBBQ meat
It's my first time eating it like this And it's a new taste
Tastes really good
Fried rice
-Are you doing okay? -I'm still hungry
That's how I like it
You can sit and relax I will cook
I use your universal powder a lot
It's perfect when you feel like the dish is missing something

I'll give you plenty So use it
I will give you your share
[I love shares]
Universal Powder is the best!
Are you currently selling this pork belly and scallion kimchi combo?
-Yes -Where can I buy it?
If you look in the description box right now
Please put it there
[Nice and big]
Meat explosion
Meat fried rice
With 2 servings of rice
But like 5 servings of meat
You can add that powder here and make spicy stir-fried pork
I got contacted from New York after being on your video
He wanted to collab to do Korean food out there

I've met some great people just because I wanted to show the world our Korean food
Now's the perfect chance
That's why I'm so grateful
I get to do big things just because I was on your video
It's really great though
The visuals are no joke
The smell...
You have to press it down
The visuals
Well?
[Try it]
So that meant "It's too hot too eat"?
Wow, this is...
What is this?
This is unbelievable
Who made this?

I'm not exaggerating
You can't possibly exaggerate this
Not too strong, but tasty
It's not salty
Let's name it... MaePaBap
I thought of this
Maehwa flower has bloomed
I sound so old
Even when I was coming up with this
Wow, I really am an old man
Continue eating and I will bring the last dish
-You need some hot soup -I love it
[Scrape everything up]
[Cleared]
I wanted to show you how to make the scallion kimchi
Really? I'm curious

Just these For 30 seconds
-30 minutes? -30 seconds
This is the 30-second-slap
Shook-shook kimchi
300g of scallions and 150g of sauce is the golden ratio
It's really called shook-shook kimchi
[Name you can easily remember]
-You don't need to wash this? -You can if you want
But it's all clean
Open the sauce
Open the bag
And squeeze in
-Make sure to get everything in there -I always squeeze everything out
And mix it up
-I thought you would do this -Your preference, just mix and massage
I think it's been over 30 secs?

The timer starts after you put the sauce
I got you
Then I agree
-Do you want to slap me that bad? -No
"I can make kimchi now" -Jang Woo
Timer starts now Go!
You can take your time
But that's too slow
[For 30 seconds]
You almost passed it
29.24 seconds
Store in room temperature for 1~2 days in the Winter
Store in the refrigerator for 3~4 days in the Summer
It will taste even better
Let's try this right away
There's a kick to it

Who made this?
Sorry
You can take this home
I love it Mine, mine
Tie it up like this just like you went to the market
Thank you for the food
I'll bring the soup now
Soybean stew
Can't forget about the meat
-Is there anything I can help with? -No no, just sit and breathe
Onions
You put all the veggies first
Put this in here
No way? Scallion kimchi too?
Since we have leftovers
-I wonder what it will taste like -It will be incredible

1 spoon of soybean paste
1 spoon of ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
And always put chopped garlic
And the universal powder
This has pollack, anchovy and other ingredients that will give it more flavor
Spicy Cheongyang chili peppers
End it with tofu
Finished
So simple
Any feedback for the scallion kimchi you had today?
I feel like everyone would enjoy it, but
It's not spicy
I wish there was an option to pick your spiciness
Have the spice levels as an option
And send the powder so that all you have to do is mix them together to your preference
I like that

And we mix the rice in there
Cooking and eating while drinking alcohol
That's why it's alcohol food
You can put fish cakes in here
[Never-ending fish cake soup]
Then you gain like 4kg
I can eat now?
It's over
That's delicious
Why is it so good?
I keep telling people that I'm a good cook
And they say "How is it good?"
I was wondering if it will be good because it was so simple to make
But it's super yummy
Thank you Bon appetit
I can sell this too

-Should I? -Would you like to do business together?
This universal powder is good with any cooking
And I feel like this scallion kimchi is also universal because it's good fresh, cooked, stir-fried, and even in the stew
This would be great with spicy stir-fried squid or pork too
You can adapt this well? Amazing
-How was that? -I love it
I'm so happy
I want to share
To show that I'm not lying
Try this
You were curious, right? Try it
It's really good
I've been notified that you're almost out of my universal powder
Thank you so much
This is the best present
And shook-shook kimchi

-And also the Maehwa pork belly -Pork belly too?
It's a Maehwa Premium Pork Belly
Thank you
So you are the CEO of Powder Chef?
It literally means what it is
A lot of people have been so curious about my powder
So I came up with this brand
I've put in a lot of time and effort to this research with my fellow chefs
Our team is so great with this
Can I join as well?
Yes of course
Not even joking
I will give you 1%
Thank you for enjoying my food There are a lot of items to be out
Will you please try my other dishes that will be coming out?
Of course Any time

A lot of people have been curious about this too
Where can we purchase this?
Search "Powder Chef" on Naver and you can find it
There will also be an event for those who use the link in the description box to purchase
I'm not in it for the money I just want people to try it first
Continue to use it if you like it If not, it's okay
I plan to give out as much as I can
And people think it is not healthy But no way
It's expensive because all the good ingredients are in here
It really is a ground-breaking invention
Just take these powders when you're traveling overseas Just like scallion powder
That's my dream
Thank you once again for making great food for me today
This is very easy to use when you're traveling out of the country
And it's really good for camping as well
I hope that you guys can also use this for your convenience

Try it!
Thanks everyone
Ta-da
I'm in charge of promoting our local fruits
And we have Korean pear today
This thing is gigantic
Size of my face
I'll eat it for dessert
This was also in the scallion kimchi sauce from earlier
They said something about girls that can cut this in 1 strip
It ripped
Let's take a big bite
It's really good Sweeter than honey
It's so tasty I think it's in season right now
I've promoted our peaches and grapes before
And they told me I've been a huge help

If you purchase local fruits, it's good for the consumers and also for our farmers
So please show support!
October 22nd is also a Pear Day
You should get together with your loved ones to enjoy Korean pear
Thanks everyone! [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
